phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket office is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿podría indicarme dónde está la taquilla?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, poh-DREE-ah een-dee-KAHR-meh DOHN-deh es-TAH lah tah-KEE-yah?

likely_response.local: En la entrada principal, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the main entrance, on the left.

responses.english: At the main entrance, on the left.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.local: En la entrada principal, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the prayer hall is
phrases.text_local: ¿Me podría decir dónde se encuentra el oratorio?
phrases.pronunciation: meh po-DREE-ah deh-SEER DOHN-deh seh en-KWEN-trah el oh-rah-TOH-ree-oh

likely_response.local: Al fondo del patio, puerta derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL pah-TEE-oh poo-EHR-tah deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the back of the courtyard, right door.

responses.english: At the back of the courtyard, right door.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL pah-TEE-oh poo-EHR-tah deh-REHTH-ah
responses.local: Al fondo del patio, puerta derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Islamic educational exhibits are
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde están las exhibiciones sobre la historia islámica?
phrases.pronunciation: DOHN-deh es-TAHN lahs eh-ksee-bee-SYOH-neh soh-breh lah ee-STOH-ree-ah ees-LAH-mee-kah

likely_response.local: En la Sala de los Secretos, al fondo.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH SAH-lah DEH LOHS sehth-REH-tohs AHL FOHN-doh
likely_response.translation_en: On the ground floor, central room.

responses.english: On the ground floor, central room.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH SAH-lah DEH LOHS sehth-REH-tohs AHL FOHN-doh
responses.local: En la Sala de los Secretos, al fondo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the original Islamic lecture hall was
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde estaba la sala de clases islámica original?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DON-deh eh-STAH-bah lah SAH-lah deh KLAH-ses ees-LAH-mee-kah oh-ree-hee-NAHL?

likely_response.local: Al fondo del patio, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL pah-TEE-oh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the back of the courtyard, on the right.

responses.english: At the back of the courtyard, on the right.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL pah-TEE-oh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.local: Al fondo del patio, a la derecha.
